results.name: Discover page loads
results.reasoning: The page shows the Discover feature working correctly with the sparkle icon, 'Discover' heading, 'Personalized recommendations just for you' subtitle, Advanced Filters section with search and dropdown options, Your Weekly Digest section with Generate Digest button, and Refresh Recommendations button at the bottom. All key elements are present and functional.

results.name: Discover — filters section visible
results.reasoning: The Discover page displays the Advanced Filters section with all required filter controls: search input field ('Search content...'), sport dropdown ('All Sports'), content type dropdown ('All Types'), and sort dropdown ('Relevance'). The page is functioning correctly with proper filter functionality available.

results.name: ForYou page loads
results.reasoning: L2 FAIL: Shows 'Unable to load recommendations' error message, which indicates the feature is not working properly and failing to load any content

results.name: ForYou — tabs visible (Recommended, Trending, Discover)
results.reasoning: L2 FAIL: The page shows an error state with 'Unable to load recommendations' message in the main content area, indicating the feature is not working properly despite having the correct tab structure

results.name: TrendingChallenges page loads
results.reasoning: L2 FAIL: The page shows the 'Trending Challenges' header with flame icon, gradient banner, subtitle, and filter tabs, but the main content area below the tabs is completely empty/black with no challenge cards, loading spinner, or empty state message. This appears to be a broken state rather than a proper empty state.

results.name: TrendingChallenges — tabs visible (All Trending, By Sport)
results.reasoning: The Trending Challenges page displays correctly with both required tab buttons visible - 'All Trending' (selected/active) and 'By Sport'. The header section shows proper branding and description. While the content area below the tabs appears empty, this is acceptable as specified in the requirements.

results.name: SportHub page loads with sport param
results.reasoning: Shows Basketball sport hub page with correct heading, subtitle, and functional Highlight Reels section containing 6 posts with real basketball content from users like Jordan Williams and NBA Daily. Posts show engagement metrics, follow buttons, and basketball-related discussions about games and stats.

results.name: SportHub — empty sport param shows fallback
results.reasoning: The page is correctly displaying 'Sport not specified' message in the main content area, which is the expected behavior when no sport query parameter is provided. The sidebar navigation is properly loaded with all menu items visible, and the overall dark theme layout is intact without any crashes or error states.

results.name: Return to Feed from discovery features
results.reasoning: Feed page is functioning properly with real content - shows user stories at top, post creation prompt, sport category filters, and an actual post from Marcus Silva with image content. Navigation sidebar is present and the dark theme is consistently applied throughout.
